limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific capex or budget figures disclosed in the excerpts; AI investment referenced only qualitatively and prospectively. Score 3 reflects named use (security tools) and acknowledgment of required investment without dollar amounts.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use in security tools is described as deployed but with no operational metrics or quantified outcomes; generative AI described as early-stage. Score 3 reflects named initiatives without deployment metrics.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present (item_15, item_1b) and includes named, company-specific risk mechanisms (vendor opacity, algorithmic bias, regulatory cost, cyber-attack amplification via AI), warranting score 4; no quantified risk figures or named governance bodies found to reach score 5.
